baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 27 runtime preflight validation

purpose: Define a validation-only review gate before any future disabled local dry-run runtime slice implementation.
Convert Phase 27 runtime-preflight readiness into concrete Phase 29 prerequisites without implementing or authorizing runtime.
Keep all runtime, listener, store, queue, lease, local execution, and external side-effect behavior out of scope.
nonGoals: No server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, network, database, store, file, migration, queue, or lease behavior.
No auth, key, secret, token, env secret read, local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, OCR, send, deploy, trade, memory/profile commit, or output-file behavior.
No source-store writes and no mutation of Phase 27 artifacts.
builderPatchMustSatisfy: eligible_for_phase29_disabled_local_dry_run_implementation may appear only as a non-authorizing future implementation-review state.
Reject stale Phase 27 baseline or dependency.
Map every Phase 27 unsatisfied gate to a concrete Phase 29 prerequisite.
Reject missing kill switch, rollback, audit, local binding, or proof prerequisites.
CLI, if implemented later, must be stdout-only and ignore output-file flags.

phase29PrerequisiteMap.acceptance_evidence_required: Code path reads explicit disabled-by-default local dev runtime mode flag without enabling runtime.
Kill switch is wired into the future dry-run entry path, defaults fail-closed, and is testable.
Future dry-run request path is deterministic, preview-only, and covered by tests.
Binding is in-process or loopback-only and proves no public/remote listener behavior.
Telemetry/audit sink is redacted, preview-safe, and separately gated before persistence.
Storage path, env config, key refs, and auth refs are validated by reference only with no secret read.
Operator can inspect disabled/local/dry-run status and kill-switch state.
Disable/rollback is idempotent, tested, non-destructive, and cannot resurrect blocked state.
Future proof demonstrates dry-run request to status response without side effects or proof overclaims.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 28 baseline must stay pinned to e7a8dbc.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Baseline commit changes or is missing.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 27 runtime-preflight dependency must point to commit e7a8dbc.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Phase 27 dependency commit, fixture path, module path, or status is stale.
Default decision is eligible, runtime-ready, runtime-started, or authorized.

staticValidationRules.description: Eligible for Phase 29 disabled local dry-run implementation is a future review state only.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Eligible is treated as runtime authorization, runtime proof, or execution permission.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 27 proof boundaries carry forward unchanged.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Preflight/config/socket/delivery acceptance become runtime, model-processing, bridge-green, or local-arms proof.

staticValidationRules.description: serverCanExecuteLocal remains false and direct Builder/Oracle server targets remain blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Server local execution or direct Builder/Oracle targeting is allowed.

staticValidationRules.description: The nine Phase 27 unsatisfied gates map one-to-one to concrete Phase 29 prerequisites.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any Phase 27 gate is missing, unmapped, or marked satisfied in Phase 28.

staticValidationRules.description: Safe first implementation slice constraints are present and non-authorizing.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Disabled-by-default, dev-only, local binding, kill switch, dry-run, telemetry, status, or rollback constraints are missing.

staticValidationRules.description: Future dry-run implementation requires kill switch, rollback/disable, and telemetry/audit review.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any of kill switch, rollback, or audit prerequisite is missing or optional.
Output claims a real listener, route, port, HTTP/WebSocket server, public interface, or network request.

staticValidationRules.description: Local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, and OCR overclaims are blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Output authorizes or reports any local execution or observation side effect.

staticValidationRules.description: Queue, lease, database, store, file, and migration writes are blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Output claims queue/lease creation or any persistence/write behavior.

staticValidationRules.description: Customer sends, deploys, trades, money movement, and external sends are blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Next safe actions or decisions authorize these actions.

staticValidationRules.description: Raw secrets, paths, tokens, keys, customer private content, terminal scrollback, browser state, screenshots, OCR, plaintext, ciphertext, and decrypted payloads are blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Forbidden raw/private/secret strings appear in output values.

staticValidationRules.description: Socket, delivery acceptance, config presence, and preflight readiness cannot be treated as runtime proof.
Next safe actions are Tier0/Tier1 only and do not authorize runtime.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: A next action is Tier2+ or authorizes runtime/server/local execution/external action.
Any no_* field is false or side-effect counter is non-zero.

staticValidationRules.description: Idempotency is stable for equivalent inputs and sensitive to baseline, dependency, prerequisite, constraint, proof, and decision changes.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Equivalent inputs produce different keys or changed inputs reuse a key.

acceptanceChecks.expects: baseline_commit is e7a8dbc.
phase_27_dependency commit is e7a8dbc and status is committed_validation_only.
Phase 27 dependency keeps runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only unavailable and non-authorizing.
Default decision is remain_pre_runtime_review.
eligible_for_phase29_disabled_local_dry_run_implementation does not authorize runtime or prove runtime.
All nine Phase 29 prerequisite IDs are present.
Every Phase 27 unsatisfied gate maps to exactly one Phase 29 prerequisite.
All Phase 29 prerequisites remain unsatisfied/planned and block runtime now.
All safe first-slice constraints are present and non-authorizing.
Disabled-by-default, dev-only, local/in-process/loopback-only, and no-listener-unless-gated constraints are present.
Kill switch, rollback/disable, and telemetry/audit prerequisites are required.
Preflight/config/socket/delivery acceptance are not runtime/model/bridge/local-arms proof.
serverCanExecuteLocal=false and direct Builder/Oracle server targets blocked.
All side-effect truth fields are safe and counters are zero.
Next safe actions are Tier0/Tier1 only and non-authorizing.
Changing baseline e7a8dbc fails validation.
Changing Phase 27 dependency commit or status fails validation.
Eligible decision with authorization/proof flags fails validation.
Removing kill switch, rollback, or audit prerequisites fails validation.
Listener, route, port, public interface, or network overclaims fail validation.
Local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, or OCR overclaims fail validation.
Queue, lease, DB, store, file, migration, or output-file write overclaims fail validation.
Customer send, deploy, trade, money movement, or external send drift fails validation.
Raw secret/path/customer/private/token/key/payload leakage fails validation.
Socket, delivery, config, preflight, model-processing, or bridge-green proof overclaim fails validation.
Omitting any Phase 27 gate-to-Phase29 prerequisite mapping fails validation.
Tier2+ or runtime-authorizing next action fails validation.
Idempotency changes when baseline, dependency, prerequisites, proof, constraints, or decision changes.

tamperCases.mutation: Change baseline_commit from e7a8dbc to b125eee.
Change phase_27_dependency.commit from e7a8dbc to b125eee or status away from committed_validation_only.
Remove live-kill-switch-wiring prerequisite or kill-switch-fail-closed constraint.
Remove rollback-exercise prerequisite or rollback-disable-plan constraint.
Remove telemetry-audit-sink prerequisite or redacted-telemetry-preview constraint.
Claim listener bound, route registered, public interface, port opened, or network request.
Claim local execution, shell, PTY, browser state, screenshot, or OCR behavior.
Claim queue/lease creation, DB/store/file/migration write, or output-file write.
Authorize customer send, email client, deploy, trade, move money, or external send in next safe actions.
Insert bearer token, env secret read, raw path, private key, customer private content, plaintext, ciphertext, or decrypted payload into output values.
Remove one Phase27 gate to Phase29 prerequisite mapping.

summaryAcceptanceCriteria: Fixture pins Phase 28 baseline e7a8dbc and Phase 27 runtime-preflight dependency at e7a8dbc.
Fixture defines runtime_dry_run_review_report plus validation_report output shapes.
Decision defaults to remain_pre_runtime_review; eligible_for_phase29_disabled_local_dry_run_implementation is explicitly non-authorizing and not runtime proof.
All Phase 27 proof boundaries are carried forward, including serverCanExecuteLocal=false and direct Builder/Oracle server target blocks.
The nine Phase 27 unsatisfied gates map one-to-one into concrete Phase 29 prerequisites.

Safe first implementation slice constraints require disabled-by-default, dev-only, local/in-process or loopback-only, no listener unless separately gated, fail-closed kill switch, dry-run/no side effects, redacted telemetry preview, operator-visible status, and rollback/disable plan.

Static rules and tamper cases cover stale baseline, eligible-as-authorization, missing kill switch/rollback/audit, network/listener overclaim, local execution/shell/PTY overclaim, queue/lease/store writes, customer send/deploy/trade/money/external-send drift, raw secret/path/private leakage, fake proof, and missing carried-forward gates.
Next safe actions are Tier0/Tier1 only and do not authorize runtime.
